name: Church Windows
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and margarine together.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Add chopped nuts, coconut flakes, and marshmallows to the melted chocolate.
4. Divide the mixture into two large portions.
5. Wrap each portion in wax paper.
6. Chill for 24 hours.
7. Slice and serve.
